commands.repair_reason: - [P1] The immediate blocker is a narrow code/test repair in src/media/read-capability.ts that an automated repair worker can attempt on the PR branch; maintainer API approval remains a separate merge gate.; Needs attention: The current head still weakens the new filesystem boundary for explicit empty roots in outbound media access.; Review finding: [P1] Preserve empty roots before appending workspace — src/media/re... commands.review_summary:
The PR adds a new per-agent `tools.fs.roots` filesystem allowlist with read/write modes and threads it through host filesystem tools, media loading, outbound delivery, docs, generated baselines, and plugin SDK media helpers.

Reproducibility: yes. for the PR-introduced bug: source inspection shows configured empty roots resolve to an empty list, then `appendWorkspaceDirToLocalRoots` converts it to the agent workspace when a workspace is available. This is not a current-main bug; it is introduced by the proposed patch.
commands.review_followup: - [P1] The immediate blocker is a narrow code/test repair in `src/media/read-capability.ts` that an automated repair worker can attempt on the PR branch; maintainer API approval remains a separate merge gate.
